steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $4$.
$$x=2$$
The answer is 2.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $2$. Substituting $8$ for $f\left(x\right)$ in the given equation yields $8=4x$. Dividing the left- and right-hand sides of this equation by $4$ yields $x=2$. Therefore, the value of $x$ is $2$ when $f\left(x\right)=8$.
